gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README, updating the latest news and recent apps sections to keep everything fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page current with the latest community activity and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the Bee updating a giant digital bulletin board or a literal book (README). The robot is holding a stack of fresh papers representing the daily news.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot working together to update a giant glowing digital bulletin board. The robot holds a stack of fresh papers while the bee pins them up. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
